governingBody: List of books confiscated for violating Criminal Code 131 authorities
reasonSummary: Confiscated by the Neuburg an der Donau Regional Court in May 2007. Unofficial title translation: Deep Wet Torture Handbook - The 100 Best Female Torture Films
